title: otacanthus azureus
intro: Otacanthus azureus, also known as Azure Sage or Blue Vervain, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, Otacanthus azureus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Otacanthus azureus can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory and digestive health.
